channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I heard a 9.4.6-channel Dolby Atmos system in Denon and Marantz's elite reference listening room in their Japan factory — here's what a best-in-class system with tech from Bowers & Wilkins, Oppo, and Sony can do
item.description: Find out which movie provides the ultimate 'AVR stress test', and what a quarter-mill of home theater gear can do

item.title: The FBI built a small town to simulate cyberattacks
item.description: Last year, the FBI opened a Cyber Range in Huntsville, Alabama, for simulating cyberattacks. Think of it sort of like the famous Hogan's Alley, but for modern digital crime training. It's a massive 22,000 square-foot replica of an entire town, complete with a convenience store, gas station, hospital, and even fully furnished houses. It's a […]

item.title: UK may ban social media for children under 16
item.description: The U.K. seems to be following Australia's lead in banning a wide swath of social media for teens.

item.title: How to watch Ivory Coast vs Ecuador: Free Streams, TV Details and Kick-Off time for World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Ivory Coast vs Ecuador for free online and from anywhere in Group E of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Many new AI data centers will be built on US drought-hit areas — raising questions over water and power supply
item.description: Nearly two-thirds of upcoming data centers tracked in a study are being built in areas that have been in drought over the last year.

item.title: Creative Assembly had ideas about an Alien: Isolation sequel before it finished developing the first game — 'Take what we love, what people love, and evolve with it'
item.description: Alien: Isolation 2 creative director has revealed that he and Creative Assembly had ideas about making a sequel before finishing the first game.

item.title: This travel hair dryer is so good, I gave away my full-size one and never looked back
item.description: Mini dryers aren't just for vacations — pick the right portable and you'll want to use it every day.

item.title: How to watch Belgium vs. Egypt online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Belgium vs. Egypt in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: A rare sticker-sealed copy of Super Mario Bros. just sold for $3 million
